column1: # Shared spec for the guard test suites. One case per line: <expect><TAB><command>
# Read by BOTH Test-BashGuard.ps1 and test-bash-guard.sh so the PowerShell and
# POSIX guards are held to identical cases and cannot drift apart.
# expect is 'allow' (hook exits 0) or 'deny' (hook exits 2). Any other exit
# code is a LEAK: that is the fail-open path and must never happen.
# Control characters in a command are backslash-escaped (n, r, t, and a
# doubled backslash). The newline case matters: a raw newline separates
# commands, so the metacharacter screen must deny it.
